name: Banana Sour Cream Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the beaten egg yolk, sour cream, milk, butter, and mashed banana until well combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredient mixture to the wet mixture, stirring constantly until just combined.
4. Carefully fold in the whipped egg white until incorporated.
5. Heat an oiled waffle iron or prepare an oiled pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared waffle iron or onto the oiled pan.
7. Cook each side of the waffles until they are golden brown.
